title: DNA extraction of Nephila clavipes using the Wizard Genomic DNA Purification kit
author: Luiz Filipe Bartoleti
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.knxcvfn
materials: Homogenize gently for one minute. 00:01:00, Homogenizing

steps.title: Macerate 1-8 legs (around 50 mg...
steps.instruction: Macerate 1-8 legs (around 50 mg of tissue) using liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Add 600 µL of Nuclei Lysis solution and homogenize
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of Nuclei Lysis solution and homogenize. undetermined, Nuclei Lysis solution

steps.title: Take the microtubes to the dry...
steps.instruction: Take the microtubes to the dry bath at 65°C for one hour. 01:00:00, Dry bath Undetermined

steps.title: Add 200 µL of Protein Precipitation solution and homogeníze
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of Protein Precipitation solution and homogeníze. undetermined, Protein Precipitation solution

steps.title: Centrifugate the microtubes at 13000 rpm for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifugate the microtubes at 13000 rpm for 10 minutes. 00:10:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a new...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a new microtube and add 600 µL of Isopropyl alcohol. undetermined, Isopropyl alcohol

steps.title: Keep the tubes at -20°C for at least one hour
steps.instruction: Keep the tubes at -20°C for at least one hour. Undetermined 01:00:00, Keeping tubes at -20°C

steps.title: Centrifugate the microtubes at 13000 rpm...
steps.instruction: Centrifugate the microtubes at 13000 rpm for 6 minutes at 4°C. Undetermined 00:06:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and add 600 µL of absolut etanol
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and add 600 µL of absolut etanol. undetermined, Etanol

steps.title: Centrifugate the microtubes at 13000 rpm...
steps.instruction: Centrifugate the microtubes at 13000 rpm for 3 minutes at 4°C. Undetermined 00:03:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Rehydrate with 50 µL of Tris-EDTA buffer
steps.instruction: Rehydrate with 50 µL of Tris-EDTA buffer. undetermined, Tris-EDTA buffer
